Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}The best thing about this station is its size, and how close it is to the ocean. We're proud of it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}I personally like it a lot. What about you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}Wonderful! I'm glad you like it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}Well, the more often you come here, the more it'll grow on you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}I see... I'm a little disappointed to hear you can't grasp the beauty of this station.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}This station plaza has a modern design, and space for many different stores.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}Please abide by the station rules and refrain from littering.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}I'm the one who has to clean it up...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}There are lots of weird people out there now. I heard it's the Apathy Syndrome victims...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}They keep walking in front of the trains and stopping them from moving.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}I'd hate to see one of them jump in front of a moving train...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}Even I don't understand what's going on here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}Right at the stroke of midnight, that train appeared right behind the other one.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}Huh? You're glad there wasn't an accident? You kids are so naive, I'm jealous...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}Because of this incident, the company's stock went down... And my salary went down with it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}If I ever find the culprit, I'm going to throw him from the train into the ocean![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}Recently... this girl has started coming around here...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}She wears this white dress with this puffy lace...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}I don't know what kind of fashion that is, but... it's not my style.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}If you go down the side street, you'll come to a spot where gangs gather.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}They always leave garbage behind and spray graffiti all over the walls.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}And every time, I'm the one who has to clean it up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}I'm going to catch those gangs someday and make them clean it up themselves...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}Every year during the rainy season, a lot of umbrellas are left in the lost and found.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}The lost and found box is full almost instantly, and I have to take care of it, and...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}Rainy days are depressing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}This station is near the high school, so I often see Gekkoukan students and their friends.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}You seem to be alone a lot... Do you have any friends?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}Great! I wish I'd had some friends when I was in school...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}I suggest you make friends now. The longer you wait in life, the harder it'll be.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}Well, that's depressing. Do what you want, I suppose.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}This couple started a fight the other day with a bouquet of flowers...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}Just like in the movies, the girl was whacking the guy over and over with the bouquet.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}Now I get nervous every time I see someone buy a bouquet down there and then walk over here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}During summer vacation, this place is so quiet, since there aren't any students rushing onto the train.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}There's always more trouble around that spot during summer vacation...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}Well, whatever they do, I just don't want them to do it over here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}As long as they stay on their side, I don't give a damn what they do.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}School started again... The students have been fun to watch this term.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}All those kids trying to look good after vacation but can't pull it off...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}Inside, I just smile at them and laugh.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}There's a giant typhoon approaching, it seems.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}If the rain gets too strong, the railways will be shut down, so please keep that in mind.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}Though I don't think anyone would go out in that kind of weather...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}I know I don't want to come to work on days like that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}The other day, I saw a young man who was... a little different.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}He seemed about the age to be in high school, and he was throwing a ball up and down.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}Do high school students still play with those kinds of toys?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}I know you've heard it before, but there seem to be more of those... weird people all the time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}I'm just worried they'll stop the trains, or something terrible.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}A Gekkoukan student was killed, huh...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}So those gangs at that spot are capable of murder...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}*sigh* It's dangerous, being a station attendant here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}After that incident, a lot of customers have been glancing over at that gang spot.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}Well, I don't blame them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}Who knows? Any of us might be the next victim of gang violence.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}I'm feeling worried myself...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}I was surprised to hear about Mr. Kirijo.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}Since the Kirijo Group has a stake in this company, I'm worried about the future.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}Though to tell you the truth, as long as I don't lose my job, I don't really care what happens.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}Those people in town are like statues.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}But since they don't stop the trains or cause any trouble...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}I prefer them to the gangs at that spot.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}I run into more couples at the end of the year than the beginning of the year.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}You got anyone you like to spend time with?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}You should get on it now. Time waits for no man![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}Wow, that's a surprise. I didn't think there were any left... Well, do what you will.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}People's manners are getting even worse these days.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}They litter, argue, fight, and people are starting to get hurt.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}And I'm the one who has to field all the complaints as a result.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}It's getting on my nerves...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}People's manners aren't very good anymore. The train and the plaza are both filthy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}Everything around me gets worse and worse... I don't know if it'll ever return to normal.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}You think so? What makes you say that?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}Well, maybe I shouldn't be so downhearted.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}You too, huh? I tell you, I can't take this anymore...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}Maybe I should quit my job and start following that cult.[n]{f 1 1}
